wyrdvane-powers.name: Soulstorm
wyrdvane-powers.description: Assault 1, 5" Blast, S equal to the number of Wyrdvanes before rolling to cast, AP3+. A psychic attack.

wyrdvane-powers.name: Weaken Resolve
wyrdvane-powers.description: Target unit suffers Ld–1 per Wyrdvane before rolling to cast.

ig-psyker-powers.name: Lightning Arc
ig-psyker-powers.description: Assault 4, S6, AP–, Tesla. A psychic attack.

ig-psyker-powers.name: Nightshroud
ig-psyker-powers.description: Target unit gains a 5+ Cover Save until your next Psychic Phase.

ig-psyker-powers.name: Psychic Augment
ig-psyker-powers.description: Target unit gains +1 To Hit until your next Psychic Phase.
